channel.title: Coin-System on Jasper's Technical Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Coin-System on Jasper's Technical Notebook

item.title: Number Theory #3.1: Sieve Problems — Coin System DP via Sieve
item.description: Greedy optimality for divisibility-chain coin systems, DP over the maximum denomination, and a sieve-style transition by adding one larger coin.
